# Policy Guide

This tutorial covers creating organizational policies
using the Gemara schema.

## Policy Structure

Understand the structure of a Gemara Policy artifact.

## Implementation Plan

Define the implementation plan for your policy.

## Evaluation Timeline

Set the evaluation timeline for compliance.

## Enforcement Timeline

Define when and how the policy is enforced.

## Adherence

Specify adherence requirements and methods.
